description: Publish a new post on Substack with human-like typing. Supports free and paid-only audience targeting. Uses keyboard navigation and deliberate delays to bypass bot detection on the editor.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Substack's editor (Substack Writer) is a ProseMirror-based rich text editor. The 'New post' button lives at the top of the dashboard. Title is input[data-testid='post-title'] or div[data-testid='post-title']. Subtitle is a contenteditable or input below the title. The body is a ProseMirror contenteditable div. Audience toggle (Everyone vs Paid) is a radio-style selector. The Publish button opens a confirmation dialog before final publish.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use data-testid attributes where available — most stable. Fall back to aria-label and role selectors. ProseMirror body uses div.ProseMirror as the main editor container.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Title field requires char-by-char typing at 80-150ms. Body can use 50ms delay. Must click each field explicitly — do not Tab. Audience selection requires clicking the toggle, then confirming. Publish confirmation dialog must be explicitly clicked.
reasoning.llm_learnings: Substack may show a 'drafts saved' toast — not an error. After clicking Publish, wait for the confirmation modal before clicking final publish button. The modal has a 'Publish now' button distinct from the draft publish button.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + editor load 3s + typing variable + publish 5s. Short post (~200 chars): ~25-35s total.

title.example: Why AI Agents Are the New SaaS

subtitle.example: The shift from software to agent delegation is already happening

body.description: Post body in plain text or markdown
body.example: Today I want to talk about how AI agents are replacing traditional SaaS...

section.description: Optional newsletter section to publish under

steps.description: Navigate to Substack dashboard and wait for main content
Verify authenticated — if redirected to sign-in, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Click 'New post' button to open editor
Wait for post editor to fully load
Click title field to focus it
Type post title with human-like delays

steps.selector: div[data-testid='post-subtitle'], input[placeholder*='Subtitle'], h2[data-placeholder*='Subtitle'], p[data-placeholder*='Add a subtitle']
steps.description: Click subtitle field (skip if not present — optional field)
Click the ProseMirror body editor to focus it
Type post body (50ms per char — bot detection minimal in body)
Click publish button to open publish settings dialog
Click final 'Publish now' in confirmation dialog
Verify post was published without errors
Return publish confirmation with post URL if available

title.example: Why AI Agents Are the New SaaS

error_handling.session_expired: Detect substack.com/sign-in redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED, re-run session login recipe first
error_handling.editor_not_loaded: Retry wait_for_selector with 15s timeout; if still fails, reload page and retry once
error_handling.publish_dialog_not_found: Check if already in publish flow; try scrolling up and finding publish button
error_handling.element_not_found: Log selector tried, capture screenshot, try fallback_selector if defined
error_handling.rate_limited: If 429 or rate limit banner detected, wait 60s then retry once
